selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_raw:

"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust fact-checking mechanism in place. This can involve leveraging AI-powered tools that can automatically identify and flag suspicious content, as well as collaborating with reputable third-party fact-checking organizations. Additionally, social media platforms must prioritize user safety by providing clear guidelines and consequences for spreading false information, while also encouraging users to report any suspicious content they come across. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust fact-checking mechanism in place. This can involve leveraging AI-powered tools that can automatically identify and flag suspicious content, as well as collaborating with reputable third-party fact-checking organizations. Additionally, social media platforms must prioritize user safety by providing clear guidelines and consequences for spreading false information, while also encouraging users to report any suspicious content they come across. Furthermore, governments and regulatory bodies must work together to establish a comprehensive framework that addresses the proliferation of fake content on social media, while also protecting the rights of both individuals and organizations.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust fact-checking mechanism in place. This involves leveraging AI-powered tools, collaborating with third-party fact-checking organizations, prioritizing user safety, providing clear guidelines and consequences for spreading false information, and establishing a comprehensive framework that addresses the proliferation of fake content on social media while protecting the rights of individuals and organizations.
